Where Thomas Joannes Stieltjes is from, people speak the language of the Frisians, called Frisian. Frisian is a Germanic language, closely related to English, Dutch, and the other Germanic languages. The Frisian language is the official language of the West Frisian people and is one of the recognized minorit y languages in the Netherlands and Germany. It is also one of the languages that are part of the larger group of Low German languages
